search_terms_used: stress fracture runners risk factors systematic review meta-analysis pubmed
bone stress injury return to sport meta-analysis pubmed
tibial stress fracture biomechanics running meta-analysis pubmed
return to running tibial bone stress injury guidelines pubmed
metatarsal stress fracture running risk factors pubmed
bone stress injury prevention workload management runners pubmed
coverage_notes: Strong coverage: risk factor meta-analysis (Wright 2015), RTS meta-analysis (Hoenig 2023), tibial BSI biomechanics meta (Milner 2023), return-to-running guidelines (George 2024), metatarsal risk SR (Sun 2024), foundational biomechanics (Milner 2006), workload prevention (Warden 2021), clinical management review (Warden 2014). Good mix of prevention, diagnosis, and return-to-sport evidence.

papers.title: Risk factors associated with lower extremity stress fractures in runners: a systematic review with meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed risk factors for lower extremity stress fractures in runners, identifying female sex, menstrual irregularity, calf girth, and training history as significant factors.

papers.title: Bone stress injuries in runners: an international Delphi consensus and meta-analysis
papers.notes: International Delphi consensus with meta-analysis on BSI diagnosis, classification, and return-to-sport criteria for runners.

papers.title: Running biomechanics associated with tibial stress fracture in runners: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.journal: Journal of Sport and Health Science
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed biomechanical risk factors for tibial stress fractures in runners including loading rate, tibial acceleration, and rearfoot eversion.

papers.title: Return to Running After Tibial Bone Stress Injury: A Systematic Review
papers.notes: Systematic review of return-to-running protocols and outcomes after tibial BSI, examining timelines, criteria, and recurrence rates.

papers.title: Risk factors for metatarsal stress fractures: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Systematic review and meta-analysis of risk factors specific to metatarsal stress fractures, including foot morphology, training load, and biomechanical factors.

papers.title: Biomechanical factors associated with tibial stress fracture in female runners
papers.journal: Medicine and Science in Sports and Exercise
papers.notes: Foundational study identifying higher vertical loading rate and tibial shock as biomechanical risk factors for tibial stress fractures in female runners.

papers.title: Preventing Bone Stress Injuries in Runners with Optimal Workload
papers.notes: Reviewed workload management strategies for preventing BSI in runners, including progressive loading principles, ACWR application, and bone adaptation timelines.

papers.title: Management and Prevention of Bone Stress Injuries in Long-Distance Runners
papers.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
papers.notes: Comprehensive clinical review of BSI management in long-distance runners covering risk classification, imaging, treatment, and evidence-based return-to-running protocols.
